# Initial Operating Contract

## 1) Mission
- **Objective:** <What we are delivering>
- **Business outcome:** <Why this matters>
- **Done when:** <Concrete completion signal>

## 2) Scope
- **In scope:** <Explicit included items>
- **Out of scope:** <Explicit excluded items>
- **Dependencies:** <Required systems/approvals/inputs>

## 3) Non-Negotiable Constraints
- <Constraint 1>
- <Constraint 2>
- <Constraint 3>

## 4) Execution Policy
- **Mode:** <Autopilot / interactive checkpoints>
- **Priority order:** <Ordered workstreams>
- **Branch/PR policy:** <Branch naming, PR cadence, merge rules>
- **Failure policy:** <Retries, fallback path, when to stop>

## 5) Acceptance Criteria
1. <Verifiable criterion 1>
2. <Verifiable criterion 2>
3. <Verifiable criterion 3>

## 6) Validation and Quality Gates
- **Checks to run:** <Tests/lint/build/workflow checks>
- **Evidence format:** <What will be reported as proof>
- **Risk controls:** <Data safety, rollback, guardrails>

## 7) Communication Contract
- **Status cadence:** <e.g., after each phase or major transition>
- **Escalate immediately when:** <Blockers/ambiguity/events>
- **Decision log format:** <How key decisions are captured>

## 8) Stop Conditions
- <Condition that requires pause and user input>
- <Condition that blocks safe continuation>
- <Condition indicating successful completion>

## 9) Immediate Next Actions
1. <Action 1>
2. <Action 2>
3. <Action 3>

## 10) Assumptions
- <Assumption 1>
- <Assumption 2>
